channel.title: Kiwi's Blog Feed
channel.description: I wonder how many people would follow my blogs using this feed...

item.title: I can't fucking sleep
item.description:
God I hate insomnia

Since I'm graduating this year, I have been job hunting, and it hasn't been going well. You know, job market being awful and such. Because of the lack of replies from the companies I've sent my CV to, and the fact I may have messed up in one of the interview tests, I have been quite anxious. It can also be my period causing me mood swings, idk.

...Continue reading

item.title: TADC: The Last Act, Part 1
item.description:
Absolute cinema

Yesterday, I went to watch TADC: The Last Act with my sister, and it was a great time! This blog does not contain EP9 spoilers, only some small thoughts and feelings about the movie.

...Continue reading

item.title: Tomodachi Life on 吊你老母 (Part 5)
item.description:
Damn already over a month since game launch

It's been a while since my last Tomodachi Life blog, I wouldn't say much happened on the island, especially because I forgot what happened and when it happened. But there are things that I did find funny.

...Continue reading

item.title: Apple Pencil
item.description:
Apple sucks

As you may already know, I am a mostly traditional artist. The reason I prefer drawing on paper instead of on mobile devices is because it just... feels better. My fingers are too stubby to draw proper lines on my phone, there is always a dissonance between the screen, my Wacom tablet and my hands, and there's so much settings on apps, it gets so overwhelming I'd rather stick to something more simple.

...Continue reading

item.title: Art Fight HTML Update
item.description:
Despite everything, I like the HTML update

Few days ago, Art Fight updated, inlcuding Tag System update and Rules update. There are a lot of complains regarding the rules, including the DNIs and tracing references made by yourself. I honestly doubt the rules are well-defined, or even feasible. How do you know if an artwork is drawn by tracing a reference, especially if the reference is a photo taken by the artist? However, one thing good from this update is the HTML update, replacing the BBCode system used for bios, permissions and comments.

...Continue reading

item.title: Project Hail Mary
item.description:
Space is scary

As you may be aware few days ago, I had a crash out over CRK's story. After all my disappointment, I decided the way to regain my hope for the future is to enjoy a story that is actually good. It had been a while the last time I went to watch a movie, so I decided to pick a movie that is well-rated. While scrolling Twitter, particularly around the time when Atermis II launched, I occasionally saw people talking about Project Hail Mary. I hadn't watched much sci-fi movies, but the topic of space always intrigued me. So yea, I went to watch it with my boyfriend.

...Continue reading

item.title: Kill Shadow Milk
item.description:
Shadow Milk fans please don't read this

Due to recent news, I decided to leave CRK, and the entire Cookie Run franchise fandom. This blog will be fueled by my full disappointment and anger at the recent plot development of CRK. If you enjoy the recent story, or is a fan of Shadow Milk, this blog will likely not be for your taste. It's a vent blog inconprehensibly ranting about Shadow Milk, using the dumb method of shitposting.

...Continue reading

item.title: Tomodachi Life on 吊你老母 (Part 6)
item.description:
Smaller updates this time

Welcome back to 吊你老母, a land of weird memes and shitposts. And this time, more fighting, more drama, and more characters.

...Continue reading

item.title: Tomodachi Life on 吊你老母 (Part 5)
item.description:
Drama, fighting, and divorce

Remember that I mentioned the lack of drama on the island. Well, I got what I asked for, and things are getting interesting. Also there's new islanders, I'll introduce them.

...Continue reading

item.title: Tomodachi Life on 吊你老母 (Part 4)
item.description:
Solar has too much rizz

Welcome to my 4th episode of my 吊你老母 island series. This time, there's more romance, more interactions, more characters, and more wacky stuff.

...Continue reading
